title: Maa Baap
writer: G. Mohanial Dave, Rajendra Krishan, Parmanand
actors: Rajendra Kumar Tuli, Kamini Kadam, Pran Sikand
plot: Sohan and Raju are two brothers. Raju works for a tea garden in Ooty and Sohan works for a textile mill and stays with his blind father, mother, wife Sarju, younger sister Pratima and son Kundan in Mumbai. Sohan & Sarju do not tak...
